title: Optimize your logs with Adaptive Logs

blocks.content: Welcome to the Adaptive Logs learning journey! This step-by-step guide will help you understand and implement log optimization strategies using Adaptive Logs.

## What you'll learn

This journey covers:

- Understanding the value and benefits of Adaptive Logs
- How Adaptive Logs works behind the scenes
- Reviewing and applying optimization recommendations
- Creating exemptions to protect critical logs
- Using segmentation for fine-grained control
- Monitoring and validating your optimization results

## Get started

To begin this journey, navigate to **Adaptive Telemetry** > **Adaptive Logs** in the main menu, then follow the milestones in order.
Ready to optimize your logs? Let's start with understanding the value of Adaptive Logs!
